data.description: The U.S. has seized a sanctioned oil tanker off the coast of Venezuela. The crude oil tanker is used to transport sanctioned oil from Venezuela and Iran. “We've just seized a tanker on the coast of Venezuela, large tanker, very large, largest one ever, actually, and other things

data.title: Power Knot releases BCG-315 grinder in Fremont, Calif., on Dec. 11, 2025. The machine is designed for heavy-duty processing of organic waste.
data.description: A new product called the BCG-315 grinder has been introduced by Power Knot LLC, a leading provider of on-site organic waste management solutions. This robust machine is designed to handle tough organic materials before they are digested, composted, or recycled. The grinder is part of the company's efforts to offer efficient solutions in waste management. The release was made in Fremont, California on December 11, 2025.
LILLY’S EXPERIMENTAL SHOT REDUCES BODY WEIGHT BY 23% IN STUDY

data.title: Dallas private equity firm, CenterOak Partners LLC, sells Turf Masters Brands to ExperiGreen Lawn Care. Over 200,000 homes serviced.
data.description: Dallas-based private equity firm CenterOak Partners LLC has revealed the sale of Turf Masters Brands, Inc. to ExperiGreen Lawn Care. Turf Masters Brands is known for offering residential recurring lawn, tree, and shrub care services. The Company, headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, serves over 200,000 households. Details of the transaction, including financial terms, have not been made public. This sale marks a significant development in the lawn care industry.
Bulgarian parliament session begins ahead of vote of no confidence

data.title: Empire's fiscal 2026 Q2: EPS $0.69, sales $7,995M (2.8% increase), net earnings $159M. Digital focus growth strategy emphasized.
data.description: Empire Company Limited reported its financial results for the second quarter ended November 1, 2025, with earnings per share (EPS) of $0.69, a decrease from $0.73 in the prior year. Sales totaled $7,995 million, up by 2.8%, with food sales increasing by 3.4%. Same-store food sales grew by 2.5%. Gross margin (excluding fuel) increased by 14 basis points. The Company recorded net earnings of $159 million. Empire's investment focus includes enhancing data capabilities, growing total adjusted EPS, and improving sales and margins. Strategic priorities involve store network investments, digital and data enhancements, and cost control strategies. Food retailing segment sales increased to $7,995 million, with gross profit of $2,147 million. Operating income for this segment decreased to $278 million. Investments and other operations segment reported operating income of $17 million. Efforts to maximize efficiency and cost effectiveness are ongoing through various strategic initiatives.

data.title: Nextdoor survey in San Francisco shows holiday neighborhood data on recommendations, local business support, and events.
data.description: In San Francisco, a recent survey conducted by Nextdoor uncovered important holiday neighborhood insights. The data captured essential information related to recommendations, support for local businesses, and community events during this festive season. The survey shed light on significant trends and preferences within the community, emphasizing the importance of neighborly engagement and support for small businesses during the holidays. This survey provides valuable insights into how residents in San Francisco are navigating and participating in local holiday activities, showcasing the strong community spirit and involvement in the area.
NORWAY ENERGY MINISTRY: CLEARS TWO GROUPS TO PROCEED WITH FLOATING WIND TENDER PROCESS

data.title: Bio-Techne and Wyss Center Geneva team up to automate RNA and protein detection in 3D tissue, improving preclinical research.
data.description: A partnership has been formed with the goal of automating the detection of RNA and proteins in 3D tissue samples, aiming to streamline processes and address technical challenges. This innovation could enhance preclinical research by decreasing the need for animal testing, utilizing New Approach Methodologies (NAMs) like organoids.

data.title: Nevada King funds 20,000m Phase 4 exploration program in Atlanta Gold Mine Project in Nevada. TSXV: NKG, OTCQB: NKGFF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 11, 2025, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTCQB: NKGFF), also known as Nevada King, has unveiled the commencement of its Phase 4 regional exploration initiative at the Atlanta Gold Mine Project in eastern Nevada. The project covers a vast area of 130 square kilometers and is entirely owned by the Company. The program is fully-funded and marks a significant step towards furthering the Company's exploration efforts in the region.

data.title: aiMotive and Macnica launch aiData Platform in Japan to offer AI-powered data virtualization for advanced automotive tech.
data.description: In Yokohama, Japan on December 11, 2025, aiMotive, a prominent supplier of advanced automotive AI solutions, announced a partnership with Macnica, their Japanese distributor. Together, they have launched a cutting-edge data collection and processing ecosystem utilizing the aiData Platform. This innovative platform aims to enhance the efficiency of data handling in automotive applications, benefiting from the expertise of both companies in the field.

data.title: Organic acids market projected to reach $19.54 billion by 2030 from $15.15 billion in 2025, at 5.2% CAGR.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 11, 2025, the organic acids market is valued at approximately USD 15.15 billion. It is forecasted to grow to around USD 19.54 billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.2%. The market data consists of 230 tables and 80 figures distributed across 300 resources.

data.title: Poland reintroduces unchanged 84-page crypto bill vetoed by president, sparking debate on EU oversight.
data.description: Recently, the Polish government introduced a revamped 84-page crypto bill, identical to one previously vetoed by the president. This move has sparked discussions regarding the balance between local and centralized EU supervision of cryptocurrency-related matters.

data.title: Lifezone Metals progresses on Kabanga Nickel Project toward 2026 FID. Significant progress post July 2025 Feasibility Study. CEO and COO announce accomplishment.
data.description: Lifezone Metals Limited's CEO, Chris Showalter, and COO, Gerick Mouton, revealed notable advancements in preparations for the Kabanga Nickel Project. This initiative, listed on NYSE as LZM, is well-positioned for a Final Investment Decision (FID) by 2026. A pivotal moment was the July 2025 Feasibility Study, as per the announcement on July 18, 2025, showcasing Kabanga as a top-tier project, boasting exceptional grade quality and substantial reserves.

data.title: Matador Resources' RBL borrowing base increases to $3.25 billion, and San Mateo bank commitments also rise unanimously.
data.description: Dallas-based Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) announced that the borrowing base under its reserves-based loan credit facility (the “RBL”) has been successfully redetermined at $3.25 billion by all nineteen members in the bank group. Additionally, all sixteen lenders in San Mateo Midstream, LLC’s revolving credit facility have unanimously agreed to renew and increase their commitment.

UKRAINE HANDS REVISED 20-POINT PEACE PLAN PROPOSAL TO US - REPORTS

data.title: SpringGreen franchise owner in Plainfield expands to six territories in Eau Claire, Wisconsin, becoming the first to do so in the system.
data.description: In Plainfield, Illinois on December 11, 2025, SpringGreen revealed the successful franchise resale in the larger Eau Claire, Wisconsin region. Jason Jordan made history by becoming the first independent owner in the SpringGreen system to manage six franchise territories. This significant transaction marks a new milestone for the company.

data.title: Poland reintroduces unchanged 84-page crypto bill after veto, sparking debate on local vs EU oversight.
data.description: The Polish government has resubmitted an 84-page crypto bill that was previously vetoed by the president. The reintroduced bill has sparked discussions regarding local versus centralized EU supervision.

data.title: Damoov's new service provides live tracking of driver location and speed through smartphones, enhancing transportation safety.
data.description: In a recent announcement on December 11, 2025, Damoov, a prominent telematics platform for smartphones, unveiled a new service. This innovative offering provides real-time updates on driver location and speed through its Software Development Kit (SDK) and Application Programming Interface (API). By utilizing the driver's smartphone rather than requiring additional hardware in the vehicle, the solution ensures swift and accurate data transmission with minimal delay.
